zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Davenport於1253年出生在英國英格蘭爾布拉哈爾時，他的父親Sir Roger Davenport28歲，母親Lady Mary Salemon25歲。他於大約1281年與Agnes de Macclesfield在英國英格蘭爾馬可萊斯費爾德結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1320年在英國英格蘭爾達文波特享年67歲，埋葬在英國爾普雷斯特波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Davenport于1253年出生在英国英格兰爾布拉哈爾时，他的父亲Sir Roger Davenport28岁，母亲Lady Mary Salemon25岁。他于大约1281年与Agnes de Macclesfield在英国英格兰爾馬可萊斯費爾德结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1320年在英国英格兰爾達文波特享年67岁，埋葬在英国爾普雷斯特波利。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Davenport was born in 1253, in Bramhall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Roger Davenport, was 28 and his mother, Lady Mary Salemon, was 25. He married Agnes de Macclesfield about 1281, in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 5 daughters. He died in 1320, in Davenport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Prestbury, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Davenport est né en 1253, à Bramhall, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Roger Davenport, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Mary Salemon, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Agnes de Macclesfield environ 1281, à Macclesfield, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé en 1320, à Davenport, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Davenport 1253 in Bramhall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Roger Davenport 28 und seine Mutter Lady Mary Salemon 25. Er hat um 1281 in Macclesfield, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes de Macclesfield geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb 1320 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Davenport, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Prestbury, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Davenport è nato il nel 1253 nel Bramhall, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Roger Davenport, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Lady Mary Salemon, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Agnes de Macclesfield circa 1281, nel Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1320, nel Davenport, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Prestbury, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Davenportが1253年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブラムハルで生まれた時，父Sir Roger Davenportは28歳，母Lady Mary Salemonは25歳であった。約1281年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアマククレスフィールドでAgnes de Macclesfieldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1320年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアダベンプオルトで67歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Davenport(이)가 1253년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브램홀에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Roger Davenport(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Mary Salemon(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1281년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 맥클스필드에서 Agnes de Macclesfield(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1320년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 대븐포트에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 플레스트버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Davenport nasceu em 1253, em Bramhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Roger Davenport, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Mary Salemon, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes de Macclesfield aproximadamente 1281, em Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1320, em Davenport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Davenport родился в 1253 г. в местности брамхолл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Roger Davenport было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Mary Salemon, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes de Macclesfield около 1281 г. в местности макклесфиелд, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер в 1320 г. в местности давенпорт, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности престбури, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Davenport nació en 1253, en Bramhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Roger Davenport, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Lady Mary Salemon, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Agnes de Macclesfield aproximadamente 1281, en Macclesfield, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1320, en Davenport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
